characteristics.characteristic: (Order Phase) Choose one friendly Ant Infantry unit within 8" of this model. Give that unit +1 Evade or +1 Skill until the end of the turn, and it suffers one UNAVOIDABLE damage.

attributes.attribute:
Pheromone Override: (Order Phase) Choose one friendly Ant Infantry unit within 8" of this model. Give that unit +1 Evade or +1 Skill until the end of the turn, and it suffers one UNAVOIDABLE damage.
Venemous Tactician: When this unit deals Poison damage, inflict an additional damage each time the target is affected by its Poison Effect Token

characteristics.characteristic: When this unit deals Poison damage, inflict an additional damage each time the target is affected by its Poison Effect Token

If it is the first turn, chose a core terrain within 12" of this model. That terrain feature gains a Webbed token. Each Order phase after the first, choose the one closest terrain feature to any Webbed terrain feature, it gains a Webbed token. When an enemy unit is within 1" of a Webbed terrain feature, that unit gains the effects of the Webbed token.
(Order Phase) When a friendly unit within 6" is the target of an Attack Order, improve the unit's armor rolls by 1
If this unit is equipped with a Gnarled Staff, increase intelligence by 2

(Positioning Phase) Target friendly or enemy unit within 8" and choose effect:
-Invigorating Pheromone: Heal unit 1d4+1
-Hallucination Pheromone: Unit gains Weakness Effect Token
-Coordination Pheromone: Give a unit +1 order
When you declare an Attack Order with this unit, this unit's Mandibles gain Flurry (6+) if they target an enemy unit which had been the target of an Attack Order by a friendly Champion this phase.
When you declare an Attack Order with this unit, this unit's Mandibles gain Flurry (6+) if they target an enemy unit which had been the target of an Attack Order by a friendly Champion this phase.
When this unit uses a Charge action, it must target the nearest enemy unit, but it received +1 to damage on its melee weapons for the rest of the turn.

While within Line of Sight to a friendly Champion, the first time this unit destroys an enemy Elite or Champion unit each phase, you may decrease this unit's Evade by 3 for the rest of the turn to make a second free ATTACK Order
During the first turn, this unit is always considered to have the benefit of Light Terrain Full Cover
Increase the movement of models in this unit to 6" and the Attacks characteristic of the Crew Knives to 8

After this unit has completed an ATTACK order, choose one enemy targeted by this unit's attacks. For the rest of the turn, whenever a friendly unit uses a weapon that inflicts a Status Effect that targets that enemy unit, that effect is inflicted on an unmodified 6+ instead of 7+
(Positioning Phase): Target one unit within 6" that has an Effect Token. You may swap out that Effect Token for any other Effect Token of your choice.
Whenever an enemy unit within 12" of this unit rolls damage for its Poison Effect Token, it must roll a second dice and select the highest result.
Each time a model in this unit dies, roll a d8. On a 5+, deal 2 unavoidable damage to the closest enemy unit.
If a model in this unit is equipped with a Hookblade, it may only attack with EITHER its Cloth Cannon or Incendiary Larvae each Attack Order.
When a friendly unit would be deployed via the "Endless Hordes" Army Rule, that unit may instead be placed within 6" of this unit and outside the range of all enemy melee weapons.
When a friendly Ant unit within 6" heals, increase the amount that unit heals by 2.
(Order Phase) Target a friendly Infantry unit within friendly territory. Heal that unit 1d4+1
Gain 1VP if a friendly unit was set up this turn and is still alive at the end of the turn.
(Positioning Phase): Target a friendly unit within 12" of a friendly Champion. That unit may increase its Move by 1d4" but must end its Positioning Phase as close to the Champion as possible.
Gain 1VP if a friendly non-Champion unit destroyed an enemy unit within 12" of a friendly Champion unit.
(Position Phase): Target a friendly Field Commander. That unit gains +1 to Skill and Evade for the rest of the turn while the unit is the furthest friendly unit away from Friendly Territory
Gain 1VP if your Field Commander is capturing a terrain piece outside of Friendly Territory
(Engage Phase): One friendly Arachnid unit within range of enemy Melee weapons gains the "Webbed" Effect on all their weapons for this phase
Gain 1VP If a friendly Arachnid unit destroyed an enemy unit that had a Webbed Effect Token
(Order Phase): Target a friendly Champion unit outside of friendly territory. That unit gains an extra Order this turn, and may distribute this Order to a friendly unit within 6"
Gain 1VP if a Champion unit controlled a terrain piece which counted towards scoring in the Primary Mission
(Order Phase): Target a friendly Ant unit within friendly territory. That unit gains an extra Order.
Gain 1VP if a friendly Ant unit ended the turn on top of a Heavy Terrain piece and no enemy units are on top of that same Terrain piece.

(Order Phase): Target two Friendly units on the battlefield. For the rest of the turn, while an invisible line can be drawn uninterrupted from a model in one unit to the other, gain one Order which can be used on either unit during any phase.
Gain 1VP at the end of the turn if an invisible line can be drawn uninterrupted between a friendly unit within No Mans Land and another friendly unit within either Friendly or Enemy Territory.

(Positioning Phase): Target one friendly Ant Swarmer unit and a friendly Ant Champion within6" of that unit. Both units gain Flurry (7+) on their melee weapons until the end of turn as long as they target the same enemy unit with those weapons
Gain 1VP if a friendly Ant Swarmer unit destroys an enemy unit that was the target of an attack by a friendly Ant Champion unit this turn
(Engage Phase): Target a friendly W.E.B Launcher that dealt one or more successful damage to an enemy unit. That unit gains an additional Webbed or Fire Effect Token.
Gain 1VP if a friendly W.E.B Launcher destroyed an enemy unit within Enemy Territory

(Positioning Phase): Target an enemy unit with a Poison Effect Token. Each time that unit declares an Attack Order, for each hit roll of 1 they roll, deal 1 Avoidable damage to their closest Friendly unit
Gain 1VP if two or more enemy units lost models this turn due to damage dealt by Effect Tokens
(positioning Phase): Target one friendly Grand Colonies Fly unit. For the rest of the turn, that unit can roll an additional d8 when declaring a Sprint or Charge order, choosing the highest value.

(Engage Phase): Target one friendly unit who has not declared an Attack Order this phase. Weapons equipped with an Effect token trait equipped by this unit have that trait replaced with the "Webbed" trait.
Gain 1VP if at least two enemy units are alive and have the Webbed Effect Token.
Target one friendly non-Champion Grand Colonies unit and a friendly Champion within 6". Both units may increase their Move characteristic by 3" for the rest of the turn.
Gain 1VP if two or more friendly units completed a Sprint Order this turn and neither were destroyed.
(Order Phase): Target one friendly Grand Colonies Champion that doesn't have the "Extra Limb" unique trait. For the rest of the game, that Champion has the "Extra Limb" Unique Trait.
Gain 1VP if a friendly Champion destroyed an enemy Champion this turn.

Whenever a friendly Mindless Swarm unit within 12" is the target of a Conflict effect effect from a secondary mission card, you may choose a second Mindless Swarm unit within 12" of Idiro, Lord of the Swarm to also apply that effect to.
(Order Phase) Choose one friendly Ant Infantry unit within 8" of this model. Give that unit +1 Evade or +1 Skill until the end of the turn, and it suffers one UNAVOIDABLE damage.

attributes.attribute:
Pheromone Override: (Order Phase) Choose one friendly Ant Infantry unit within 8" of this model. Give that unit +1 Evade or +1 Skill until the end of the turn, and it suffers one UNAVOIDABLE damage.
Venemous Tactician: When this unit deals Poison damage, inflict an additional damage each time the target is affected by its Poison Effect Token

characteristics.characteristic: Once per game, when this unit activates, target a friendly unit within 6”. That unit may immediately activate after this unit has completed its activation.
Once per game, target a friendly unit within 6". That unit heals 1d8 and also gains a Poison Effect Token
Once per game, when this unit activates, target a friendly unit within 6”. That unit may immediately activate after this unit has completed its activation.
Before the game begins, choose one melee weapon equipped by this Champion, increase the attacks of that weapon by 1 for the remainder of the game.
Enemy units within range of Melee weapons equipped by this Champion must target a different unit (other than this champion) with Melee attacks if they are within range of that unit.
Increase the Armour equipped by this Champion by one step.
While this unit is within Friendly Territory, when making the health roll for a replacement unit using “Endless Swarms”, you may add an extra model to the unit restored.
Friendly units within 6” gain Evade +1 while targeted by Attack Orders from enemy units.
Melee Weapons equipped by this Champion deal 2 Unavoidable damage to all units within its range after resolving an Attack Order.

Once per game, during the Positioning phase,, this Champion may “plant” the Banner on a Terrain piece within 1”. Until the end of the turn, that Terrain piece is under your control and cannot be controlled by enemy units.
Once per Attack Order, the Weevil Homunculus deals 1 Unavoidable damage to an enemy unit within 1” of this Champion. In addition, this Champion gains +1 intelligence.
